title: Prometheus Export Template — primary scrape config context
description: Config Context Profile for the `prometheus-export-template` key consumed by export-templates/device-prometheus-sd.j2. Primary scrape configuration, typically scoped per role/OS (e.g. Linux Server -> node_exporter on 9100, Windows Server -> windows_exporter on 9182). Upload this as the `schema` field of a NetBox ConfigContextProfile (Extras > Config Context Profiles > Add) and assign the profile to any ConfigContext that sets `prometheus-export-template`.

prometheus-export-template.description: Primary scrape configuration. Typically scoped per role/OS. Omit on devices that only need OOB or service-level monitoring.

port.description: TCP port on the device or exporter target.

exporter_type.description: Identifier for the exporter that ultimately produces these metrics — emitted as the `exporter_type` label so dashboards/alerts can filter by exporter family. Required. Recommended values: `node_exporter`, `windows_exporter`, `snmp_exporter`, `fortigate_exporter`, `idrac_exporter`, `ilo_exporter`, `blackbox_exporter`.

scheme.description: Protocol used to reach the device. With `exporter` set, scheme prefixes `__param_target` so the exporter knows what protocol to probe. Without `exporter`, scheme is emitted as the Prometheus `__scheme__` meta-label, overriding the scrape job default.

target_scheme.description: Deprecated alias for `scheme`. Continues to work for backwards compatibility; prefer `scheme` in new contexts.

metrics_path.description: Path the metrics endpoint is served on. Emitted as the Prometheus `__metrics_path__` meta-label.

exporter.description: Optional exporter `host:port` that scrapes the device on your behalf (snmp_exporter, fortigate_exporter, idrac_exporter, blackbox-style probes, etc.). When set, the exporter becomes `__address__` and the device address moves to `__param_target` so the exporter receives it as a URL parameter.

params.description: Additional URL parameters passed to the exporter. Each key becomes a `__param_<key>` label. List values are CSV-joined (e.g. snmp_exporter modules).

scrape_interval.description: Per-target scrape interval override (Prometheus duration string, e.g. "30s", "1m", "2m30s"). Emitted as `__scrape_interval__`.

scrape_timeout.description: Per-target scrape timeout override (Prometheus duration string). Emitted as `__scrape_timeout__`. Must be less than `scrape_interval`.
